system.description:
The psyker gains psychic impressions from objects or areas through physical contact. More information requires sustained time: 10 Rounds = strongest associated emotion; 20 = general features of the person who experienced it; 30 = clear image of the person; 40 = occupation (Career and Rank); 50 = name; +10 Rounds = additional GM-determined fact. Subtract a number of Rounds equal to Psy Rating from each threshold.

Focus Power Test: Psyniscience

Prerequisites: Augury

XP Cost: 200
